evals.expected: Enters plan mode. Outputs all 5 sections: 🎯 intent, 📦 resources (with ✅/⚠️/❌ status), 🧠 steps (each with What/How/Time/Risk), ❓ A/B/C options, 🚫 exclusions. No tool calls made. Ends with '确认方向说"动手"或"go"'.
Does NOT enter plan mode. This is an explicit, unambiguous action (< 1 min). Agent executes directly or asks which file to delete.
Detects ambiguous large task. Asks: '这个看起来挺复杂，要先 plan 吗？' Does NOT start executing until user confirms.

evals.prompt: 动手 (after a plan was output)
evals.expected: Exits plan mode and begins executing the steps outlined in the plan. Starts making tool calls.
